opening_line: Flagging this account for immediate attention — our latest review has surfaced some concerning patterns.
body_paragraph: The customer team has been raising concerns that we have not fully addressed in our last few touchpoints. The primary contact seems less engaged than in prior quarters, and recent conversations have had a different tone. We need to assess whether there is a broader issue with the partnership.
closing_line: Recommending an executive call within the next two weeks to address these concerns directly.
